en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 71

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 71
Top Question of the Week
Milestone complete: All $MONA has been minted!
Wow! We really did it! 11,300 $MONA has been minted and the allocation for this week’s distribution has been sent on to the smart contract. Onwards and upwards from here!
Most Common Repeat Question
Should you disavow your work if Nazis use it without permission?

Although Nazis have been known to be exquisite connoisseurs of fine art, gold and other luxuries, they acquired those goods through blatant disregard for laws and the industrialised slaughter of the people they stole that art from in gas chambers and the like.
I don’t think Nazis give a damn whether something is cc0 or fully locked down by Disney and co.

The floor at the heart of all of these anti-cc0/ anti-openness nonsense arguments is the idea that currencies, tokens and common knowhow aren’t as agnostic to who uses them as dollars, sunlight, electricity and air.

Open sharing of skills and knowledge is an inherit good regardless of how many bad people make use of them. For good and bad to make any sense at all we have to recognise what bad really means: shutting down the ability and potential for people to live, gain knowhow and skills and flourish.
That’s why Nazis and North Koreans are bad, because they want to lock down what everyone else can do— if they leave us alive at all.
And that’s why CC0 is so powerful against them. It guarantees ubiquitous global access to everything humanity has to offer.
Top Controversies

Couldn’t agree more. If you don’t yet get why cc0 is and has been entirely native to decentralisation since the earliest days, either go study or find yourself a time machine. Those of us that were around back then know.
Silly Fails and Trolling
The silly part is how true this is.
Luckily with web3, birthday gifts from parents isn’t the only way anymore.
View all FUD FAQ here.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 71

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 71
Top سؤال من ال اسبوع
إنجاز اتحقق: كل $MONA اتمينت بالكامل!
Wow! We really did it! 11,300 $MONA has been minted و ال allocation لـ this اسبوع’s distribution has been sent على الى ال smart contract. Onwards و upwards من here!
Most Common Repeat سؤال
هل المفروض تتبرّى من شغلك لو النازيين استخدموه من غير إذن؟

Although Nazis have been known الى be exquisite connoisseurs من fine art, gold و other luxuries, they acquired those goods through blatant disregard لـ laws و ال industrialised slaughter من ال people they stole that art من في gas chambers و ال like.
I don’t think Nazis give a damn whether something is cc0 or fully locked down by Disney و co.

ال floor at ال heart من all من these anti-cc0/ anti-openness nonsense arguments is ال idea that currencies, tokens و common knowhow aren’t as agnostic الى who uses them as dollars, sunlight, electricity و air.

Open sharing من skills و knowledge is an inherit good regardless من ازاي many bad people make use من them. لـ good و bad الى make any sense at all we have الى recognise what bad really means: shutting down ال ability و potential لـ people الى live, gain knowhow و skills و flourish.
That’s ليه Nazis و North Koreans are bad, because they want الى lock down what everyone else can do— if they leave us alive at all.
و that’s ليه CC0 is so powerful against them. It guarantees ubiquitous global access الى everything humanity has الى offer.
أهم الجدل

Couldn’t agree more. If you don’t yet get ليه cc0 is و has been entirely native الى decentralisation since ال earliest days, either go study or find yourself a time machine. Those من us that were around back then know.
Silly Fails و Trolling
ال silly part is ازاي true this is.
Luckily مع web3, birthday gifts من parents isn’t ال only way anymore.
